articles.description: “Unfortunately, my last performance on ‘Moulin Rouge! The Musical' will be May 1,” Megan said of her exit, which was originally scheduled for May 17. “I’ve met so many amazing people in this theater.”

articles.title: 'General Hospital' Star Kirsten Storms' Ex Granted Restraining Order Due to 'Mental Health Crisis' - TMZ
articles.description: Kirsten Storms' ex-husband Brandon Barash claims the soap star is exhibiting concerning behavior and he fears for their son's well-being, and now a judge agrees she is suffering from a mental health crisis ... TMZ has learned.

articles.description: Rehearsals revealed the problem, which the show decided not to fix.

articles.title: Actor Nathan Chasing Horse sentenced to life in prison in Nevada for sexual assault - CBS News
articles.description: The "Dances With Wolves" actor was accused by three Indigenous women and girls, including one who was 14 when the assaults began. He was convicted in January on 13 of the 21 charges he faced.

articles.description: Nicholas Braun and Hong Chau, as well as vocal talent including Julia Louis-Dreyfus, Bella Ramsey and Bryan Cranston, are featured in this film about a flock of sheep trying to solve their shepherd's murder.

articles.title: Ben Stiller’s awkwardly timed Knicks tweet causes backlash after WHCD shooting - New York Post
articles.description: Ben Stiller ruffled some feathers with his celebratory tweet after the Knicks evened their first-round playoff series with a 114-98 Game 4 victory over the Hawks on Saturday night.

articles.title: ‘The Voice’ Contestant Dylan Carter Dies at 24 in Car Accident - Variety
articles.description: 'The Voice' contestant Dylan Carter died in a car accident. He was 24.
